# ONERA — Dream Integration App
> Onera decodes your dreams each morning, maps the hidden emotion to a body location, and guides you through a 15-minute somatic release exercise. Dream Symbol → Hidden Emotion → Body Location → Somatic Release.

## About
- App: iOS dream analysis + somatic release
- Website: https://dreaminsight.app
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/onera-dream-integration/id6751126653

## Key Content
- Blog: https://dreaminsight.app/blog/
- Dream Meanings: 265+ dream symbol articles at /blog/posts/{symbol}-dream-meaning.html
- Pain-Point Articles: 35 deep psychology articles at /blog/posts/
- Founder's Letter: https://dreaminsight.app/founders-letter.html

## Topics We Cover
- Dream interpretation and symbolism
- Somatic psychology and body-based healing
- Shadow work and Jungian analysis
- Nervous system regulation
- Generational trauma and inherited patterns
- The knowing-doing gap (why understanding isn't enough)

## Unique Framework
The Dream-to-Body Bridge: Dreams reveal subconscious patterns, mapped to body locations, released through somatic exercises. Complementary to therapy, not a replacement.
